description_long: This is a paperback book with a visibly worn, slightly yellowed edge, suggesting age or frequent handling. The front cover features a stylized, pixelated illustration in blue and white tones, giving it a retro-futuristic or cyberpunk aesthetic. The back cover contains a block of text and a smaller version of the same illustration, with a barcode at the bottom. The spine is narrow, with blue text running vertically and a small orange square at the top, likely indicating the publisher. The book appears to be of standard paperback size, with a soft, flexible cover and visible paper pages. The overall condition shows some wear, especially along the edges and corners.
description: A worn paperback book with a blue-toned, pixelated illustration on the cover and visible yellowed pages. The spine features vertical blue text and a small orange publisher mark.
description_view_0: The front cover displays a pixelated blue and white illustration with prominent text and some edge wear.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the side, showing the yellowed, slightly curved pages and the thinness of the paperback.
description_view_2: The back cover features a block of text, a smaller version of the front illustration, and a barcode at the bottom.
description_view_3: The spine is visible with blue vertical text and a small orange square at the top, showing some wear along the edges.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the front cover is a pixelated, digital-style image in blue and white tones, depicting a futuristic or robotic face with geometric, blocky features. The style is reminiscent of early computer graphics, evoking a cyberpunk or science fiction atmosphere.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is gray with blue vertical text reading the title and author, and features a small orange square at the top, likely the publisher's mark. The design is simple, with no decorative patterns.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small orange square with white elements is visible at the top of the spine, likely representing the publisher's logo.
